label: Us Return Seasonality
signal: Scale market exposure +/-20% by the rolling 5-year same-month return sign.
description: Same-calendar-month seasonality (Heston-Sadka style): market exposure scaled ±20% by the rolling 5-year same-month average return's sign. FF Mkt, monthly, 5bps/side.
reference: Heston & Sadka (2008), 'Seasonality in the Cross-Section of Stock Returns'
